message.content:
[
  {
    "idea": "Consumer Stress Surge via Google Trends Baking Supplies Spike",
    "family": "consumer_stress",
    "data": {
      "source": "Google Trends weekly search interest for baking supplies",
      "type": "api",
      "frequency": "weekly",
      "stable": true
    },
    "behavior": "Increase in searches for baking supplies signals rising home cooking and possible consumer stress or lockdown anticipation.",
    "market_impact": {
      "direction": "bearish",
      "sector": "XLP",
      "rationale": "Rising consumer stress often causes defensive consumer staples buying but signals risk aversion for broader consumer sectors."
    },
    "trade_logic": {
      "entry": "Enter short XLY if baking supplies Google Trends rises more than 15% WoW for 2 consecutive weeks",
      "exit": "Exit after Google Trends falls below 10% WoW increase for 2 weeks or after 4 weeks",
      "expected_frequency": "medium"
    },
    "expected_fire_rate": "weekly",
    "historical_backfill": true,
    "minimum_history_months": 18,
    "adapter_status": "existing",
    "trigger_sensitivity": "medium",
    "reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days": "Google Trends spikes in baking supplies happen multiple times yearly due to consumer stress or event-driven cooking booms."
  },
  {
    "idea": "Labor Jobs Surge in Temporary Staffing vs XLY Weakness",
    "family": "labor_jobs",
    "data": {
      "source": "Weekly temporary staffing job postings data",
      "type": "api",
      "frequency": "weekly",
      "stable": true
    },
    "behavior": "Rising temporary job postings while consumer discretionary ETF lags indicates cautious hiring and consumer spending uncertainty.",
    "market_impact": {
      "direction": "bearish",
      "sector": "XLY",
      "rationale": "Temporary hiring surges often precede mixed consumer discretionary performance due to consumer caution."
    },
    "trade_logic": {
      "entry": "Enter short XLY if temporary staffing postings rise 10% WoW and XLY price down 2% WoW",
      "exit": "Exit after temporary staffing postings normalize or XLY recovers 3% WoW",
      "expected_frequency": "medium"
    },
    "expected_fire_rate": "weekly",
    "historical_backfill": true,
    "minimum_history_months": 24,
    "adapter_status": "existing",
    "trigger_sensitivity": "medium",
    "reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days": "Temporary staffing data updates weekly and can spike with economic uncertainty multiple times yearly."
  },
  {

      "exit": "Exit after railcar loadings drop below 3% WoW increase or XLI rebounds 2%",

    },

    "adapter_status": "existing",
    "trigger_sensitivity": "medium",
    "reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days": "Railcar loadings data updates weekly and often show volatility around economic cycles."
  },

  {

      "stable": true
    },

    "market_impact": {
      "direction": "bearish",
      "sector": "XLV",
      "rationale": "Insider selling often predicts near-term sector softness, especially in regulated sectors like healthcare."
    },
    "trade_logic": {
      "entry": "Enter short XLV if insider selling filings exceed 3x 30-day average on a given day",

  },
